sample1.command: fastp --in1 sample1_R1.fastq.gz --in2 sample1_R2.fastq.gz --out1 sample1_R1.fastp.fastq.gz --out2 sample1_R2.fastp.fastq.gz --json sample1.fastp.json --html sample1.fastp.html --thread 4 --detect_adapter_for_pe

sample2.command: fastp --in1 sample2_R1.fastq.gz --in2 sample2_R2.fastq.gz --out1 sample2_R1.fastp.fastq.gz --out2 sample2_R2.fastp.fastq.gz --json sample2.fastp.json --html sample2.fastp.html --thread 4 --detect_adapter_for_pe
